title: Laursen Pmax/Tmax Protocol
description: Individualized VO2max intervals based on personal physiology
purpose: Individualized VO2max intervals based on personal physiology

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 15:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 15:00 at 75%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting strong. 8 reps to go. The first one sets your standard for the rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 1/8. Target: 120% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Don't overshoot first 30s — settle in smoothly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First rep is always the hardest mentally. Once you're in it, commit fully. 8 intervals ahead.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 3:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/8. 120% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Set the tone. Execute with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 6:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/8. 55% FTP, Seated. 6:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 19% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 2/8.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/8. 120% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/8. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2/8. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 2: 120% for 3:00. Execute each rep with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 6:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/8. 55% FTP, Seated. 6:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 6:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/8. 33 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 3/8. 5 to go. You've accumulated 6min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/8. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/8. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 120% for 3:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 6:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 39% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 46% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 6min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 46% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 46% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 46% done. 120% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 49% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 6:00 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 45 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 6:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 56% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 3:00 at 120%. Then 6:00 rest. Pace yourself for repeatability.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 56% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 56% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 56% done. 120% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 6:00. Then 31min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 59% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 6:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 6/8. You're 65% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 6: 120% FTP. You're 60 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65% through the session. Every pedal stroke is making you faster. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 65% done. The good news: almost finished. The bad news: 2 intervals left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 60 minutes in. 120% FTP, 90-100 rpm. This builds your race-winning power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 63 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 69% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 69% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're 75% through this session. The deep work happens now, when you're tired.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 7/8. 3:00 at 120%. Cadence: 90-100 rpm. Seated. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've done 18 minutes of hard work. You can do 1 more intervals. Believe it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 75% complete. Rep 7/8. Fatigue is real — hold form. 120%, 90-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 79% done. 0 intervals left. 13 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 21min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 79% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 79% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 79% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. 3:00 at 120%. Empty the tank. You've got 10 minutes of cooldown coming.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 115-120% FTP, 90-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 10 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep! 3:00 at 120%. Leave nothing in reserve. You'll be cooling down in 10 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 3:00 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 115-120% FTP, 90-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 89% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 24min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 89% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
